reviews.comment:
Quiero destacar la atención del playero Juan cruz que me atendió en la estación de brown y Santa Fe ,muy amable, respetuoso y con una excelente presencia. Se nota cuando alguien trabaja con ganas y buena onda. Realmente marca la diferencia en la experiencia

(Translated by Google)
I want to highlight the excellent service I received from Juan Cruz, the gas station attendant at Brown and Santa Fe. He was very kind, respectful, and had a great presence. You can tell when someone is passionate and has a positive attitude. It truly makes a difference to the experience.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2sxdVpEWjBRVjlWU0RoTmEyTTNVM0pNY2pSMVlYYxAB

reviews.comment:
Un espectáculo esta estación de servicio, allí venden unos arrancadores portátil 3 en 1 muy bueno.

(Translated by Google)
This gas station is amazing; they sell some really good 3-in-1 portable jump starters.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25wWlYyazRZME5WVW5wZk1sSTFkVmR2TVd4VFQzYxAB

reviews.comment:
Fuimos a desayunar en YPF Full y tenía una raspadita para canjear. Andrea me asesoró rápidamente cómo resolverlo desde la app y además nos recomendó otro menú para probar que resultó DE LI CIO SO!! Súper recomendables los productos, pero un PLUS PLUS por la maravillosa atención!! Gracias Andrea y Caro!! Volveremos seguro!!

(Translated by Google)
We went for breakfast at YPF Full and I had a scratch-off ticket to redeem. Andrea quickly helped me figure out how to use the app and also recommended another menu item to try, which was absolutely delicious! The products are highly recommended, but the wonderful service was a huge plus! Thank you, Andrea and Caro! We'll definitely be back!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25GVVlrOWpaWEptVTI1VFFYZGhNbU5mUkhaRFZWRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar atencion y servicio.
Llegue de caba y me atendieron espectacular.Aprovecho a pedirle al ACA que haga una tarifa diferenciada de precios al socio vitalicio del socio plenario.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place, great service and attention.
I came from Buenos Aires and received spectacular service. I'd like to take this opportunity to ask the ACA to offer a different pricing structure for lifetime members compared to full members.

reviews.comment:
Edificio muy viejo, poco lugar para estacionar

(Translated by Google)
Very old building, little parking

reviewReply.comment:
Hola Laura, es un edificio qué pertenece al patrimonio histórico de la ciudad, hay casi 800 cocheras con espacio de estacionamiento para los Socios de la Institución. 
Y es por otra parte el estacionamiento cubierto más grande de Mar del Plata.
